Class BattleEngine

java.lang.Object
logic.BattleEngine
public class BattleEngine extends Object
Core turn-based battle controller for the game.

This engine is responsible for:

  • Tracking the current BattleStage and advancing the battle flow
  • Handling hero input (choose skill, choose target, choose ally)
  • Resolving hero actions and coordinating the monster turn
  • Emitting state updates and logs to the UI through BattleListener

Typical flow:

  1. Start at BattleStage.HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL
  2. Hero selects a skill, possibly selects a target or ally
  3. Engine resolves action, then moves to next hero or to BattleStage.MONSTER_TURN
  4. UI animates monster attacks using monsterAttackOne(Monster) for each monster
  5. UI calls executeMonsterTurnAndContinue() after all monster attacks are finished

  • Field Details

    • model

      private BattleModel model
      Battle data model containing teams, indexes, and pending action state.

    • stage

      private BattleStage stage
      Current stage of the battle state machine.

    • listener

      private BattleListener listener
      Listener used to notify the UI about state changes, model updates, and logs.

    • turnCounter

      private int turnCounter
      Counts completed rounds. Increased after monsters finish their turn.

  • Constructor Details

    • BattleEngine

      public BattleEngine(BattleModel model)
      Creates a new battle engine and initializes the battle state.

      This constructor:

      • Sets initial stage to BattleStage.HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL
      • Sets global game state to GameState.BATTLE
      • Selects the first alive hero as the active hero
      • If no heroes are alive, sets BattleStage.LOSE_TURN and GameState.DEFEAT
      • Resets per-hero turn state by calling resetAfterTurn() on each hero
      • Resets turn counter to 1
      Parameters:
      model - battle model containing hero and monster teams and shared state

  • Method Details

    • setListener

      public void setListener(BattleListener listener)
      Sets the listener used by the UI layer to receive engine events.
      Parameters:
      listener - listener that will receive stage changes, model updates, and log messages

    • getModel

      public BattleModel getModel()
      Returns the battle model used by this engine.
      Returns:
      battle model

    • getStage

      public BattleStage getStage()
      Returns the current battle stage.
      Returns:
      current stage

    • beginBattle

      public void beginBattle()
      Begins the battle by emitting the current stage and a model update to the listener.

      UI typically calls this once after creating the engine.

    • onClickHeroSkill

      public boolean onClickHeroSkill(SkillType skill)
      Handles the UI action where the active hero chooses a skill type.

      Behavior depends on the current BattleStage and the selected skill:

      • Only works during BattleStage.HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL
      • Checks cooldown for SkillType.SKILL and SkillType.ULTIMATE
      • Determines target type using checkSkillTarget(Heroes, SkillType)
      • Moves to target selection stage, ally selection stage, or resolves immediately
      Parameters:
      skill - selected skill type
      Returns:
      true if the click was accepted and the engine advanced, false otherwise

    • onClickChoosingTarget

      public boolean onClickChoosingTarget(int monsterIndex)
      Handles the UI action where the player selects a monster target by index.

      This method only works during BattleStage.HERO_CHOOSE_TARGET. The engine resolves the active hero action against the selected monster.

      Parameters:
      monsterIndex - index of the monster to target (0-based)
      Returns:
      true if the click was accepted and action resolved, false otherwise

    • onClickChoosingAlly

      public boolean onClickChoosingAlly(Heroes ally)
      Handles the UI action where the player selects an ally hero target.

      This method only works during BattleStage.HERO_CHOOSE_ALLY. The engine resolves the active hero action against the selected ally.

      Parameters:
      ally - ally hero to target
      Returns:
      true if the click was accepted and action resolved, false otherwise

    • onCancelSelection

      public void onCancelSelection()
      Cancels target or ally selection and returns to BattleStage.HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL.

      This only works during BattleStage.HERO_CHOOSE_TARGET or BattleStage.HERO_CHOOSE_ALLY. Pending skill selection will be cleared.

    • findNextAliveHeroIndex

      private int findNextAliveHeroIndex(int currentIdx)
      Finds the next alive hero index after the given index in round-robin order.
      Parameters:
      currentIdx - current active hero index, or -1 to start from the beginning
      Returns:
      index of next alive hero, or -1 if no alive heroes exist

    • resolveHeroAction

      private void resolveHeroAction(Heroes h, Target target, SkillType skill)
      Resolves a hero action by delegating to Unit.castSkill(SkillType, Target).

      This method emits a model update after executing the skill.

      Parameters:
      h - active hero
      target - resolved target container
      skill - selected skill type

    • afterHeroAction

      private void afterHeroAction()
      Executes post-hero action logic:
      • Clears pending skill
      • Checks victory condition
      • Advances to next hero if available
      • Otherwise moves to BattleStage.MONSTER_TURN

      When the battle ends, this method sets the game state to victory or defeat.

    • monsterAttackOne

      public void monsterAttackOne(Monster m)
      Performs exactly one monster attack so the UI can animate attacks one by one.

      The engine selects a random alive hero as the target. If the monster is null or dead, nothing happens.

      Parameters:
      m - monster that will attack

    • executeMonsterTurnAndContinue

      public void executeMonsterTurnAndContinue()
      Called by the UI after all monster attacks have completed.

      This method:

      • Checks defeat condition
      • Ticks cooldowns for all alive heroes
      • Resets hero shields
      • Selects the first alive hero for the new round
      • Increments the turn counter
      • Moves back to BattleStage.HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL

    • resetHeroShield

      private void resetHeroShield()
      Resets all hero shields to 0.

    • pickRandomAliveHero

      private Heroes pickRandomAliveHero()
      Picks a random alive hero from the hero team.
      Returns:
      random alive hero, or null if all heroes are dead

    • getActiveHero

      private Heroes getActiveHero()
      Returns the currently active hero, or null if the active index is invalid or the hero is dead.
      Returns:
      active hero or null

    • getActiveMonster

      private Monster getActiveMonster(int idx)
      Returns a monster at a given index, or null if index is invalid or the monster is dead.
      Parameters:
      idx - monster index
      Returns:
      monster at index or null

    • tickCooldownsForHeroes

      private void tickCooldownsForHeroes()
      Decrements cooldown counters for all alive heroes.

    • isMonsterAllDead

      private boolean isMonsterAllDead()
      Checks whether all monsters are dead.
      Returns:
      true if all monsters are dead, false otherwise

    • isHeroAllDead

      private boolean isHeroAllDead()
      Checks whether all heroes are dead.
      Returns:
      true if all heroes are dead, false otherwise

    • checkSkillTarget

      private static TargetType checkSkillTarget(Heroes h, SkillType skill)
      Determines the targeting behavior for a hero class and skill type.

      This method is used to decide whether the UI should request a single enemy, a single ally, all enemies, all allies, or no explicit target selection.

      Parameters:
      h - hero whose class is used to select target rules
      skill - chosen skill type
      Returns:
      target type required by this hero class for the selected skill

    • getBattleStage

      public BattleStage getBattleStage()
      Returns the current battle stage.
      Returns:
      current stage

    • setBattleStage

      public void setBattleStage(BattleStage battleStage)
      Sets the current battle stage without emitting any events.
      Parameters:
      battleStage - new stage

    • getTurnCounter

      public int getTurnCounter()
      Returns the current turn counter.
      Returns:
      turn counter

    • setTurnCounter

      public void setTurnCounter(int turnCounter)
      Sets the current turn counter.
      Parameters:
      turnCounter - new turn counter

    • emitState

      public void emitState(BattleStage s)
      Emits a stage change event to the listener.
      Parameters:
      s - new stage

    • emitUpdate

      public void emitUpdate()
      Emits a model update event to the listener.

    • emitLog

      public void emitLog(String msg)
      Emits a log message event to the listener.
      Parameters:
      msg - log message to display
